auth_notes: Requires an API Key generated from the Pendo Feedback settings page. The key must be passed in the HTTP header as 'X-Auth-Token'.
gotchas: The API uses a non-standard header name 'X-Auth-Token' which requires manual Header Auth configuration in n8n.
Webhooks must be manually configured within the Pendo Feedback UI as there is no API endpoint for webhook management.
Pagination uses limit/offset parameters, requiring a recursive loop or 'Wait' node logic in n8n for large datasets.
research_notes: Integration requires the n8n HTTP Request node. Authentication should be set up using 'Header Auth' with the name 'X-Auth-Token'. The base URL is typically https://feedback.pendo.io/api/v1. Webhook integration will require a standard n8n Webhook node, with the resulting URL pasted into the Pendo Feedback 'Integrations' settings.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration requires the n8n HTTP Request node. Authentication should be set up using 'Header Auth' with the name 'X-Auth-Token'. The base URL is typically https://feedback.pendo.io/api/v1. Webhook integration will require a standard n8n Webhook node, with the resulting URL pasted into the Pendo Feedback 'Integrations' settings.
